graph_owner: nightly graphify agent (#1854/#1888) owns graph.json (3888 nodes/5853 links @308e7b55); E6 triples recorded sidecar to avoid clobber. graphify limitation: Tree-sitter does not cross YAML(CI)↔TS(route) namespaces, so the gate→route 'gates' edges below are hand-extracted from smoke-test.yml/deploy-vps.yml on origin/main.

label: .github/workflows/smoke-test.yml
note: DEPLOY GATE. install switched npm ci→`bun install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts` (L60) — the #1855 drift fix is LANDED on deploy truth. Smokes factorylm.com + app.factorylm.com.

label: .github/workflows/deploy-vps.yml
note: workflow_run:[Smoke Test] AND refuses deploy unless Staging Gate succeeded on same commit. workflow_dispatch hotfix bypass requires skip_reason → auto-opens audit issue.

label: .github/workflows/staging-gate.yml
note: runs every PR to main against NeonDB staging branch; second of the two deploy gates.

smoke asserts /api/documents unauth→401 (P0-2 tenant gate) on app.factorylm.com

KG god node #2 (degree 95). smoke P0-2 exercises the hub's most-depended-on auth chokepoint in prod before promote.

text: The deploy gate smoke-tests the two beta-breakable P0 invariants (rate-limit, tenant isolation) against the LIVE hub, and the P0-2 assertion (/api/documents unauth→401) exercises sessionOr401() — the #2 god node (degree 95), the single most-depended-on auth function in the hub graph. Highest-leverage auth dependency is gated in production before every promote.

headline: Two-gate deploy (Smoke ∧ Staging Gate) intact; #1855 bun fix LANDED & gating; staging fully real (compose+spec+runbook present); E-scope frozen since E5 (9 commits, 0 touch workflows/compose/migrations). Residuals are doc-hygiene only: R1 package-lock.json undeleted, R2 hot.md head=037 vs actual hub 052, R3 CLAUDE.md staging *(TODO)* stale.
